errors.message: Defining constructors as functions with the same name as the contract is deprecated. Use "constructor(...) { ... }" instead.
This function only accepts a single "bytes" argument. Please use "abi.encodePacked(...)" or a similar function to encode the data.
"block.blockhash()" has been deprecated in favor of "blockhash()"
